description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 7th; Slot ring; Price 10,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This ring functions as a ring of jumping, except it grants the wearer a +10 competence bonus all her Acrobatics checks made to make high or long jumps. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Forge Ring; Special creator must have 10 ranks in Acrobatics; Cost 5,000 gp.
